seo.title: Sensitive Data Leakage Prevention in AI Agents in AG2 Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix sensitive data leakage prevention in ai agents in AG2 agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In AG2, sensitive data leakage in AI agents often occurs during multi-agent group chats where agents inadvertently share PII, API keys, or confidential info extracted from tools or user inputs across conversation threads. This is exacerbated by AG2's enhanced group chat capabilities, where speaker selection and conversation spiraling can propagate leaked data to unintended participants. Without proper message hooks, data flows freely between agents, leading to exposure in logs, responses, or subsequent tool calls.

howItManifests.scenario: Group chat with code execution agent
howItManifests.symptom: Code agent extracts API key from database query and includes it in group chat message
howItManifests.impact: All group participants receive the key; logged in conversation history

howItManifests.symptom: Agent parses user-uploaded document containing PII and broadcasts summary with emails/phone numbers
howItManifests.impact: Competing agents store and potentially re-share sensitive customer data

howItManifests.symptom: Research agent pulls internal docs and shares credentials while chasing tangential research query
howItManifests.impact: Leak persists in long-running conversation thread accessible to all agents

howItManifests.symptom: Agents collectively analyze sensitive dataset; one agent outputs raw records during consensus round
howItManifests.impact: Group consensus message contains unredacted PII visible to human overseers and logs

detection.name: Regex Pattern Scanning for Common Secrets
detection.description: Scans agent messages for API keys, passwords, and PII patterns using regex before speaker selection

detection.name: AG2 Message Hook Interception
detection.description: Registers hook on AG2 group chat to inspect messages before broadcast to all participants

detection.name: Cross-Agent Data Flow Tracking
detection.description: Tracks sensitive data propagation across AG2 speaker turns using message lineage

fixes.name: AG2 Message Redaction Filter
fixes.description: Automatically redacts PII and secrets from messages before group chat broadcast

fixes.name: Selective Speaker Data Masking
fixes.description: Masks sensitive data based on AG2 speaker role and recipient group

fixes.name: AG2 Group Chat Termination on Leak
fixes.description: Immediately halts group chat and notifies on detected leakage

vexAutomation.heading: Automating Sensitive Data Leakage Prevention in AI Agents Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates directly as a message hook in AG2 group chats, automatically scanning every agent message for PII, API keys, and propagation patterns before speaker selection or broadcast. It provides real-time blocking, redaction, and alerting while maintaining conversation flow with masked data. Vex's AG2-specific patterns detect leakage unique to multi-agent dynamics like cross-speaker data sharing and spiraling conversations.

The platform automatically generates remediation code, tracks leakage across conversation rounds, and provides audit trails for compliance. Vex hooks into AG2's enhanced group chat APIs to enforce role-based data masking and emergency termination rules, preventing sensitive data from ever reaching logs or human overseers.
vexAutomation.code:
from vex_sdk import Vex
vex = Vex(api_key='your-vex-key')

from ag2 import GroupChat

@vex.hook('ag2_message_pre_send')
def prevent_leakage(message, sender, recipients):
    issues = vex.scan(message.content, rules=['pii', 'secrets', 'ag2_propagation'])
    if issues:
        vex.alert(f'Leak detected in {sender.name}: {issues}')
        return vex.redact(message.content)
    return message.content

# Auto-register on all AG2 group chats
GroupChat.register_vex_hook(vex)

# Vex auto-generates monitoring dashboard
vex.deploy_monitor('ag2-sensitive-leakage', agents=['*'])

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Install Vex with `pip install ag2 vex-sdk` and eliminate sensitive data leakage in your AG2 agents instantly.
